name: Topgolf Greensboro
about: Topgolf Greensboro is a premier entertainment destination offering year-round comfort with air-conditioned bays in the summer and heated bays in the winter. Each bay features HDTVs and utilizes high-tech balls that automatically score. The venue provides a social golf experience with a focus on technology, hospitality, and a relaxed atmosphere suitable for both casual players and serious golfers. Pricing is structured per hour, per bay, with various promotions available throughout the week.
why_golfers_like_it: All-weather bays with climate control for comfortable play year-round
High-tech automatic ball tracking and scoring system
Variety of games including Toptracer for entertainment and skill improvement
Flexible pricing with promotions like Beat the Peak and Sunday Funday

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar and restaurant available with a menu featuring classics, unique treats, vegetarian, and gluten-free options. Kitchen is on-site.
Full bar with specialty drinks available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Topgolf Greensboro provides complimentary clubs for guests to use. Players are also welcome to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full bar and restaurant with a wide variety of food and drink options available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the number of players and your skill level, but generally, a game of 18 holes can last anywhere from 45 minutes to over an hour.

faq.question: Is Topgolf Greensboro kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes. The venue is family-friendly with an age policy that allows children under 16 to play if supervised by a guest 21 or older. It offers a fun atmosphere suitable for all ages.
